hero.title: Work at ConnectSphere
hero.lead: We're building a calmer way to find real-life connection: curated meets, thoughtful hosts, and a product experience that respects people's time. If you believe software should help people show up—not scroll forever—we'd love to meet you.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.heading: Help people spend their evenings where it matters: together, in the room
mission.body: ConnectSphere exists to reduce friction between intention and attendance. We partner with hosts and cities to make small-group meets easy to discover, safe to join, and rewarding to repeat. We're a small team with a global mindset: ship quickly, listen to hosts and members, and keep the interface honest.

testimonials.name: Jordan M.
testimonials.quote: I've worked on consumer apps at scale—here I get to own end-to-end flows that directly change whether someone feels welcome at a table. The pace is fast, but the mission is crystal clear.

testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.quote: The team debates ideas on merit and ships in days. I learn something every week from people who care about craft and about the humans on the other side of the screen.

testimonials.name: Alex R.
testimonials.quote: Helping hosts feel supported—not surveilled—is rare. We're building tools that make responsibility feel lightweight, and I see the impact in host retention every month.

testimonials.name: Noah K.
testimonials.quote: It's energizing to tell a story I actually believe in. We're not optimizing for infinite feeds; we're optimizing for people leaving the app happier than they arrived.

testimonials.name: Elena V.
testimonials.quote: We're distributed across time zones but share one bar: clarity. That shows up in how we hire, how we document, and how we respect async work.

testimonials.name: Sam T.
testimonials.quote: Metrics are in service of better meets—not the other way around. When something doesn't help hosts or members, we're willing to cut it.

valuesHeading: How we show up every day

values.title: We show up with clarity
values.body: We write decisions down, default to async context, and avoid mystery roadmaps. When priorities shift, we say so—so teams can adapt without guessing.

values.title: We show up with momentum
values.body: We'd rather learn from a small release than wait for certainty. We scope honestly, ship, measure, and iterate—especially when the path is fuzzy.

values.title: We show up adaptable
values.body: Hosts and cities don't fit one template. We listen, adjust playbooks, and treat feedback as signal—not noise—so the product stays grounded in real rooms.

values.title: We show up with pace
values.body: Speed matters when people are planning their week. We bias to decisions on a short clock, document tradeoffs, and follow through.

values.title: We show up with care
values.body: Safety and respect are non-negotiable. We take reports seriously, protect privacy, and build features that make vulnerable moments feel safer.

perks: Health coverage options where we hire
Annual meet stipend—join a ConnectSphere circle anywhere we operate
Home office budget and ergonomic support
Learning budget for courses, conferences, and books
Transparent leveling and growth conversations twice a year
Quiet meeting culture—we protect focus time

social.title: Follow us for job updates
social.body: We post new roles, team stories, and behind-the-scenes product work. Connect with us to hear about openings as soon as they're live.

lifeGallery.title: Life at ConnectSphere
lifeGallery.subtitle: Offsites, host meetups, and the quiet work that keeps the product human.
